Patient Information Leaflet for dossier HUM-NEW-LINE-AMR-CEFT-0029.
Product: Ceftriaxone 1 g powder for injection (ceftriaxone); strength 1 g; route intravenous.
Applicant: Aster Healthcare (EA) Ltd (Kenya); Manufacturer: NovaCare Formulations Ltd (South Africa).
PIL Section: What this medicine is and what it is used for.
PIL Route and Form: Route=intravenous or intramuscular; Dosage form=powder for injection; Strength=1 g.
PIL Instructions: Follow the prescribed dose schedule. Do not exceed recommended dose.
PIL Warnings: Reference-aligned warning: hypersensitivity to cephalosporins. Reference-aligned warning: serious allergic reactions. Reference-aligned warning: antibiotic-associated diarrhoea.
PIL Storage: Store below 30C and protect from light.
PIL Adverse Effects: Common effects include gastrointestinal upset and headache; serious effects require urgent review.
Antimicrobial Classification: Watch; stewardship warning and prudent-use statement included.

SmPC for dossier HUM-NEW-LINE-AMR-CEFT-0029.
Product: Ceftriaxone 1 g powder for injection (ceftriaxone); strength 1 g; route intravenous.
Applicant: Aster Healthcare (EA) Ltd (Kenya); Manufacturer: NovaCare Formulations Ltd (South Africa).
SmPC 4.1 Therapeutic indications: As approved in the application form.
SmPC 4.2 Posology and method of administration: Dose by age/weight and clinical condition as approved.
SmPC 4.3 Contraindications: hypersensitivity to ceftriaxone or other cephalosporins.
SmPC 4.4 Special warnings and precautions: serious hypersensitivity reactions; antibiotic-associated colitis.
SmPC 4.8 Undesirable effects: nausea, diarrhoea, rash, dizziness; serious adverse reactions listed.
SmPC 6.4 Special precautions for storage: store according to label and stability commitments.
Antimicrobial Classification: Watch; stewardship warning and prudent-use statement included.
